page_content:
You may also receive additional merit and need-based scholarships depending on the strength of your application or ﬁnancial situation.

How to Apply 1. Submit your application (http://www.miis.edu/admissions/apply/) for

one of our degree programs by the next priority deadline. Please indicate that you're afﬁliated with Language Flagship when prompted on the online application.

2. You may also waive your application fee at http://go.miis.edu/
